text.tspan: Share of the population living in urban areas, 2023
Data source: UN Population Division (via World Bank) (2025)
Note: Because the estimates of city and metropolitan areas are based on national definitions of what constitutes a city or metropolitan area,
cross-country comparisons should be made with caution.
